examples: Championing the cause of the solitary artisan comes naturally to Kalin, a boyishly ambitious Nonconformist who wouldn't look out of place at the local skate park.
His thick black hair was combed forward, with a lock falling boyishly onto his forehead.
He is a slight man with sandy-colored hair and a boyishly unlined face.
During three hours of bipartisan scolding he sounded boyishly contrite.
